---
title: "Workshop Introduction"
subtitle: "Using Generative and Agentic AI <br> for Omics Data Analysis" 
date: 2025-08-26
author:
  - name: Jelmer Poelstra
    email: poelstra.1@osu.edu
    affiliation: 
      - name: CFAES Bioinformatics Core
        url: https://go.osu.edu/bioinformatics-core
  - name: Menuka Bhandari
    email: bhandari.1@osu.edu
    affiliation: 
      - name: CFAES Bioinformatics Core
        url: https://go.osu.edu/bioinformatics-core
  - name: Hannah Toth
    email: toth.1@osu.edu
    affiliation: 
      - name: Department of Plant Pathology
        url: https://plantpath.osu.edu/
  - name: Jonathan Jacobs
    email: jacobs.1@osu.edu
    affiliation: 
      - name: Department of Plant Pathology
        url: https://plantpath.osu.edu/
title-slide-attributes:
  data-background-color: "silver"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: [default, theme_mod.scss]
    css: slides.css
    smaller: true
    scrollable: false
    progress: true
    incremental: false
    slide-number: true
    slide-level: 2
    highlight-style: pygments
    embed-resources: false # Can't be used with chalkboard
    chalkboard:
      theme: whiteboard
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 1
    toc-title: Overview
    footer: "[~ GenAI-workshop ~](https://cfaes-bioinfo.github.io/agentic-ai-workshop/)"
    logo: img/CFAES-Horiz-RGBHEX.svg
    menu:
      width: wide
      numbers: true
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
bibliography: refs.bib
---

# Instructor introductions {background-color="silver"}

## Introductions: Jelmer (instructor)

**Lead of the CFAES Bioinformatics and Microscopy cores**

- Part of what is currently known as the Molecular & Cellular Imaging Center (MCIC)
- We are now officially under **CFAES Research & Analytical Service Cores (RASC)**,
  a set of core facilities providing services in molecular biology,
  high-throughput sequencing, bioinformatics, microscopy, and soil analyses.

. . .

**What I work on**

- Providing research assistance with omics data analysis

- Teaching, such as this course, workshops, and Code Club
  (<https://osu-codeclub.github.io>)

. . .

**Otherwise**

- Research background in animal evolutionary genomics & speciation

- In my free time, I enjoy bird watching -- locally & across the world

# Brief participant introductions {background-color="silver"}

# Overview of the workshop's topics and schedule {background-color="silver"}

# How to follow along, ask questions, etc. {background-color="silver"}
